item.title: Another black man killed in cold blood by a police officer
item.description:
https://www.mlive.com/news/grand-rapids/2022/04/see-video-in-grand-rapids-police-fatal-shooting-of-patrick-lyoya.html
This is Patrick Lyoya. He was killed by a police officer on Monday, April 4th in Grand Rapids, Michigan, during a traffic stop. Allegedly, the stop was for a license plate that didn't match the vehicle. Patrick ran out of the car and the officer caught up to him. The videos were released today at a press conference, and are very graphic. You can see the cop pinning him down and shooting him in the back of the head. The police officer conveniently dropped his body cam when this happened, but the passenger of the car Lyoya was driving was able to record video. In one of the released videos, the officer can be heard yelling "Drop the taser!" as though Patrick had stolen the officer's taser, and the passenger is yelling that Patrick didn't have his taser. The taser can't be seen in the video, and it's unfortunately suspected that the officer shouted this to cover himself. Not only that, but the taser had already been discharged, so it couldn't have hurt him anyway. What's also suspicious is that GRPD barricaded the police station prior to a protest and this footage being released. The officer's name is also not disclosed. Even if he did have the cop's taser, with how he was pinned down, the officer could have shot him ANYWHERE else. But no, he had to shoot him IN THE BACK OF THE HEAD. And on top of that, a taser couldn't have killed him. He couldn't wait for backup? Patrick Lyoya and his family emigrated here from the Republic of Congo, and their native language is Swahili. It was difficult for Patrick to communicate with the officer, and he was scared. He was shot in the back of the head while pinned down with his belly on the ground. This was murder. This is disgraceful, and there's no excuse for this. I am so worried that the officer's going to claim self-defense and no justice will be served. Edit: A couple of people have pointed out that a tazer can be used as a direct contact weapon even after being discharged, and another couple of people mentioned that the body cam was held down (possibly due to pressing against Patrick) and thus shut off. This doesn't change how I feel about this situation, but I wanted to clarify that because I don't want to state false information!
item.dc:creator: Ralyza22

item.title: Russian activists sneak messages about the war on price tags.

Translation...
...freaking creative and genius.
Thank you to everybody who still stands up to the regime inside this evil Empire. This idea needs to be spread far and wide. Slava Ukraїni!!! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cQDCjGZqQM8

item.title: I know this doesn’t apply to everyone but
item.description: My young life wasn’t perfect but I always knew that my parents did what they Did because they loved us Edit: seems that people didn’t get that both my parents are gone. Glad this hit the feelers it did. If if makes one person pick up the phone & say hi then it worked

item.title: Foster kitty barrier battle
item.description: Bad kitty June isn’t supposed to be in the bathroom. She’s big enough to hop the barrier now. The Imgur community is amazing and has asked how they can help my fosters. We are always in need of supplies! There is a wishlist linked if you’d like to send some kitty things our way. :) https://www.amazon.com/hz/wishlist/ls/1CWKEHIN8OBJP?ref_=wl_share

item.dc:creator: thefreckledfox

item.title: My best close up of the moon yet.
item.description:
Let the camera set the ISO and shutter speed for this one. 1/30s shutter and 320 ISO.
Manually boosted the ISO to 3200 and sped up the shutter to 1/1000s for this one. Most Viral Edit: Holy cow... Was NOT expecting THIS to be my first thing to go into Most Viral! Thank you so much for the positive comments and I'll try to answer any questions you ask me! Edit 2: https://imgur.com/a/EpWzi17 Setup for those that are wanting it
item.dc:creator: JewelShisen

item.title: All stolen, no body pics
item.description: Hey Imgur! One of the BEST things about this place is I do not have to look at shirtless progress pics! Let’s keep it that way for those of us who actively avoid all other social media platforms! Go to the usual suspects of online vanity societies if you wanna flaunt that progress pic, but keep it out of my sacred slice of the internet pls!!!
item.dc:creator: jessedeee

item.title: She is such an awful person
item.dc:creator: Snax007

item.title: Do not assume everyone on the internet is a bad faith actor.
item.description: You should always engage honestly with questions that are asked online, unless you actually know the person posting them and can show a pattern of bad faith. Even if you believe someone is acting in bad faith, you should still be able to engage with and answer their questions like an adult. Even if those questions are uncomfortable to you or trigger you. Getting emotional and engaging a bad faith actor on their level brings the entire conversation down to just that. Using personal insults or demographic terms to describe someone is never helpful, and in fact is the exact thing that bad faith actors do to try and "win the argument" instead of actually having the discussion. Even if you consider yourself left-wing politically you are no better than Tucker Carlson or Steven Crowder if you goal is to "win" the argument instead of furthering the discussion. Your goal should be to help the other person learn, instead of bashing them repeatedly and trying to start a dogpile (for your own gratification). The bad faith arguing I've seen on Imgur has rapidly increased recently. Lots of philosophical and debate bro terms being thrown around in the context of insulting someone instead of providing education. If you consider yourself on the left then your goal should not be to imitate people on the right. EDIT: I guess it's my cake day, so thanks for everyone who came here to talk and chat and kept it overall friendly. You are appreciated
item.dc:creator: canigifinpaint

item.title: You look like you need some "Tenacious P" in your life
item.dc:creator: GhostTater

item.title: Sent this to my electrician friend saying I fixed it and he didn't need to come over. 10 minutes later he was pounding on my door with the fear of god in his face.
item.description: I of course apologized for the joke and gave him beer and money for his time since he looked and fixed my actual problem while he was there. When you're friends with a professional regardless if it's a hard trade or soft. IT, Mechanic, photographer, or anything else. ALWAYS OFFER FAIR COMPENSATION!!!! Because they're your friend you can trust that they will treat you fair and do a good job vs a stranger. But it doesn't mean it should be a free job. Something simple sometimes a few beers are enough but always offer a fair rate if you don't want them to start avoiding you. Also don't only call them when you need something, that's not a real friendship.
item.dc:creator: researchonyourown

item.title: It's meme dump day, again...
item.description:
Happy Wednesday everyone.
My husband and I want to be them for Halloween this year. And also just be them.
Ibuprofen is so much better than diamonds.
Feeling truly beautiful then.
When you're right, you're right.
I have 5 siblings. I usually bug my friends first, though my sister is a frequent recipient
Big oof.
I'm definitely not bitter toward my religious upbringing /s
Embrace absurdism.
No.
My physical therapy has helped a ton with my posture but not so much with the neck pain
Mouse knows what's up.
It's honestly so easy. (Except when it isnt!!XD)
So many "studies" like this. Its fucking embarrassing.
So real. But worth it.
Someday I'll move out of the bible belt
This body is a lemon and I demand to see life's manager!
Stupid sexy mantis
This is where all these dumps come from. I have to keep in touch with my friends somehow
Definitely was not.
Oops.
Always a bright side
Man. What a weird few years it's been.
Don't cancel elrond.
This could work.
This is literally my husband and sons relationship. Kids are tough.
Sorry pan.
Caterpillar wants to smoke some weed tax.
item.dc:creator: kaeldra

item.title: Clubbing Prime Minister
item.description:
Sanna Marin, the clubbing prime minister of Finland is looking very good indeed. She is one of the youngest PM’s in the world. Tough spot during tough times with pandemic and the fear of neighbouring Russian agression. So there is also substance, not just cool looks. In Finland we also have a president, whose role is to take care of foreign politics (partly shared responsibility). Sauli is our old wise fox. Combining youth and wisdom is a good mix. This is the way.
Finnish PM coming through
item.dc:creator: tennessine
